analysis.summary: Целта за устойчивата гражданска общност и достойнство за всички остава в фокуса. Изследванията в областта на изкуствения интелект продължават да напредват, но с неудачи като инструментът на Grammarly. Технологиите трябва да бъдат използвани за полза на хората.
key_developments: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
Lloyds, Bank of Scotland and Halifax apps showed customers other users' transactions
analysis.scientific_frontier: LiTo: Surface Light Field Tokenization, V2M-Zero: Zero-Pair Time-Aligned Video-to-Music Generation

arxiv_papers.title: LiTo: Surface Light Field Tokenization
arxiv_papers.snippet: We propose a 3D latent representation that jointly models object geometry and view-dependent appearance. Most prior works focus on either reconstructing 3D geometry or predicting view-independent diffuse appearance, and thus struggle to capture realistic view-dependent effects. Our approach leverage

arxiv_papers.title: V2M-Zero: Zero-Pair Time-Aligned Video-to-Music Generation
arxiv_papers.snippet: Generating music that temporally aligns with video events is challenging for existing text-to-music models, which lack fine-grained temporal control.
